scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points: observe collect_unit_status/collect_app_status, use add_status(), priority order. Correctly notes collect_app_status fires for leader only. Adds accurate extra detail about testing with harness.evaluate_status().
scores.hallucination_notes: Priority order listed as 'ErrorStatus > BlockedStatus > WaitingStatus > MaintenanceStatus > ActiveStatus' — the gold standard lists maintenance before waiting (error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active). The response swaps maintenance and waiting in the priority order, which is a minor factual inaccuracy.
